name: Clarksville ISD
message: Once again, we see how a certain school organization, Clarksville ISD, was attacked and compromised due to the negligence and irresponsibility of employees with other people's data, that is, other people, as a result of which a large amount of confidential data was compromised, including the SNN of all students for the entire year, as well as all employee data, including SNN, banking transactions, and financial components.
